declared_losses: Limited evidence set: only 3 substantive records available for synthesis.

parsed.work_plan: Synthesize three evidence facts into a short note: (1) non-inferiority uses a declared 0.10 margin, (2) observability is separate from quality, (3) provider failures yield inconclusive runs, not inferiority proofs. Frame around what claims are licensed vs. precluded under these constraints.
